leadText: The Magma Emblem (Japanese: マグマのしるし Magma Symbol) is a Key Item introduced in Generation III.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Magma Emblem allows the player to open the hidden entrance to Team Magma's Hideout at the Jagged Pass .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description E A medal-like item in the same shape as Team Magma 's mark.

sections.title: In the core series games

Pyre 's summit (from an old lady after confronting Team Aqua )
